title: conyza longispina
intro: Conyza longispina, also known as African fleabane, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Conyza longispina are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Conyza longispina can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
